'''Babbadod''' was a colony [[Planet/Legends|world]]<ref name="SL">''[[Shield of Lies]]''</ref> of the [[Inner Rim/Legends|Inner Rim]] located on the [[Hydian Way/Legends|Hydian Way]] between the planet [[Chardaan/Legends|Chardaan]] and the [[Itani Nebula/Legends|Itani Nebula]].<ref name="EA" /> In the early years of the [[New Republic/Legends|New Republic]], the planet Babbadod was visited by the [[Koqus liner]] ''[[Star Morning]]'', which was owned by the fleeing [[Fallanassi/Legends|Fallanassi]] religious order.<ref name="SL" /><ref name="CE">{{CSWECite|I||Babbadod}}</ref>

==Appearances==
*''[[Shield of Lies]]'' {{1stm}}
